scripts.dev: lsof -ti :3456 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3457 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; concurrently -n proxy,web -c cyan,green "cd packages/proxy && npx tsx src/index.ts" "cd apps/web && npx next dev --port 3457"
scripts.dev:app: lsof -ti :3456 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3457 2>/dev/null | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; concurrently -n proxy,web,app -c cyan,green,magenta "cd packages/proxy && npx tsx src/index.ts" "cd apps/web && npx next dev --port 3457" "npm run tauri dev"
